name: Shenzhen Huijie Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Huijie Group Co., Ltd. produces and sells underwear in China. The company also provides swimwear and accessories. It offers underwear products for men, women, and chidren under the Mannifen, Ives, Lan Zhuoli, Plus One Shangpin, Qiao Baishi, Body Beauty, Secret Weapon, and Mr. Potato brands. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Manni Fen Knitwear Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shenzhen Huijie Group Co., Ltd. in July 2011. Shenzhen Huijie Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
